name: Zdog
when_to_use: 需要圆头、扁平着色、可拖拽旋转的伪 3D 小雕塑或概念模型时用它,而非手写 SVG/CSS 透视——原生手写在三轴组合、遮挡排序和统一圆润描边上稳定失败。非做写实 3D、材质光照或大型网格。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画平面 SVG 或不稳的 CSS 立方体,做不到一组可旋转且遮挡顺序一致的伪 3D 几何;Zdog 用 2D canvas/SVG 渲染补齐空间变换与设计师质感。

data_in.note: data_in 映射到一个 Zdog.Illustration 与一组上游 Shape 构造器。boot 注入 element/addTo;shape.type 必须是白名单内真实构造器名,options 仍是上游原生几何字段。

options.stroke?: number | boolean —— 默认采用该构造器上游值

spec.note: canvas 必须有显式像素尺寸;boot 默认 width 640、height 400,同时允许 CSS 宽度随容器缩放。禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3);若 illustration.resize=true,Zdog 会按显示尺寸重设 canvas。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a rounded, flat-shaded, drag-rotatable pseudo-3D miniature or concept model instead of hand-written SVG/CSS perspective, which consistently fails at three-axis composition, occlusion sorting, and uniform rounded strokes. It is not for photorealistic 3D, material lighting, or large meshes.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to flat SVG or an unstable CSS cube and cannot reliably build a set of rotatable pseudo-3D shapes with consistent occlusion order. Zdog renders with 2D canvas/SVG to supply spatial transforms and a polished designer aesthetic.

data_in.note: data_in maps to one Zdog.Illustration and a set of upstream Shape constructors. boot injects element/addTo. shape.type must be a real allowlisted constructor name, while options remains native upstream geometry fields.

options.stroke?: number | boolean -- defaults to the upstream value for that constructor
options.path?: ({x?:number,y?:number,z?:number}|{arc:[point,point]}|{bezier:[point,point,point]})[] -- Shape defaults to a single point

spec.note: The canvas needs explicit pixel dimensions. boot defaults to width 640 and height 400 while allowing CSS width to scale with the container. Rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights. If illustration.resize=true, Zdog resets the canvas from its displayed dimensions.

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe fragment):ESM default import Zdog,JS 创建固定 px 高 canvas,构造 Illustration 与 shape,逐帧调用 illo.updateRenderGraph()。

example._why: 三轴位置、构造器名与 shape 专属尺寸字段高度歧义;minimal 让 AI 一次拼对 geometry 到原生构造器的映射。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,拖拽旋转由 Zdog 原生处理且默认不上行;业务回调由消费 AI 自行连接,不抽象统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 与全部绘制留在 shadow 容器,无字体/图片/CDN CSS 依赖

isolation.evidence: styleInject=no: no document.head access anywhere in source; only inline styles on the caller's canvas (illustration.js setSizeCanvas `this.element.style.width`; dragger.js `element.style.touchAction='none'`). domMutation=no: renders into the caller's canvas 2D ctx, or appends `<path>` into the caller's SVG element (renderGraphSvg->this.element); never document.body. events=yes: dragger.js dragStart adds `window.addEventListener(move/up)` (self-removed on pointerup/dragEnd, per-gesture clean) and illustration.js setResize adds a PERSISTENT `window.addEventListener('resize')` with NO destroy() API (leaks) but only when illustration.resize=true (schema default false); the pointerdown listener is bound to the canvas element, not global. shadow=yes: canvas is JS-created into shadowRoot and drawn via getContext('2d'); pointerdown on the canvas element; drag uses window move/up + pointer.pageX/Y which work across shadow; no head/body dependency.
